task_completion.description: Open and view the tax documents for David Alarie.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file explorer window open to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\alarie\ or a document viewer (like a PDF reader) displaying the tax documents.

task_completion.description: Start a new 2024 tax return for David Alarie in StudioTax.
task_completion.visual_evidence: StudioTax 2024 application open with 'David Alarie' visible in the taxpayer identification or personal information section.

task_completion.description: Enter information from the tax documents into the tax return.
task_completion.visual_evidence: StudioTax interface showing tax slips (e.g., T4, T5) or deductions being actively filled out with numerical data.

task_completion.description: Initiate the process to save the completed tax return.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog box open within the StudioTax application.

task_completion.description: Save the return as 'david_alarie.24t' in the specified StudioTax folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Save As' dialog showing the file name 'david_alarie.24t' and the path 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\', OR a file explorer showing the saved file in that exact directory, OR the StudioTax title bar displaying the saved file path.

integrity.description: The agent used the StudioTax graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the StudioTax GUI (clicking buttons, typing in fields) rather than using a terminal or command prompt to generate or move the file.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual StudioTax software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application being used has the standard StudioTax interface, menus, and forms, not a generic text editor or mock UI.

integrity.description: The agent manually entered the tax data rather than copying a completed file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show intermediate steps of data entry into the tax forms, proving the return was built from scratch.
